# Workflow × Test Coverage Matrix

Computed join of every workflow in `docs/product/WORKFLOW_MAP.md` against the journey/e2e spec that exercises it (crosswalk: `docs/testing/coverage/workflow-test-map.json`). A WF with no existing mapped spec is a coverage gap; gaps must be on `workflow.allowlist.json` (with a reason) or the gate fails.
